case_title: LYNN DE LA VALETTE VS. JANICE GRUVER et al

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER THAT SERVICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT BE MADE BY POST AND MAIL, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF VALETTE, LYNN DE LA
